scripts.format: biome check packages README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml nx.json tsconfig.base.json biome.json vitest.workspace.ts --write
scripts.format:check: biome check packages README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml nx.json tsconfig.base.json biome.json vitest.workspace.ts
